case_title: CITY COUNTY SF TAX COLLECTOR VS. SHARONE MORRIS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.50) SERVED OCT-17-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORRIS, SHARONE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY COUNTY SF TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MORRIS, SHARONE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY CITY COUNTY SF TAX COLLECTOR MORRIS, SHARONE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY COUNTY SF TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORRIS, SHARONE $1,260.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,260.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
